name: OP Find DAT
description: The OP Find DAT traverses the component hierarchy starting at one component and looking at all nodes within that component, and outputs a table with one row per node that matches criteria the user chooses. For example, the criteria could be all Ramp TOPs, or all nodes whose name starts with “wave”, or all nodes with the Clone parameter set to “master1”, or all Geometry components with a tag called “emitter”.
summary: The OP Find DAT traverses the component hierarchy starting at one component and looking at all nodes within that component, and outputs a table with one row per node that matches criteria the user cho

parameters.name: Active Cook
parameters.label: Active Cook
parameters.description: Determines when to cook the .

parameters.name: Off
parameters.label: Off
parameters.description: off - This stops the operator from cooking altogether. auto - Only cook / update the contents when the results would change. always - Continually cook this operator repeatedly for update cases that might be missed. incremental - This will cook each frame, but only add one result per cook, until all results are added. At that point cooking stops.

parameters.name: Cook Pulse
parameters.label: Cook Pulse
parameters.description: cookpulse - Manually force the OP Find  to update.

parameters.name: Component
parameters.label: Component
parameters.description: component - The path to the component where the search starts from.

parameters.name: Include Component
parameters.label: Include Component
parameters.description: includecomponent - Include the component the search starts from in the search itself.

parameters.name: Include Wire Hierarchy
parameters.label: Include Wire Hierarchy
parameters.description: includewired - Any components wired to the starting component are included in the search.

parameters.name: Minimum Depth
parameters.label: Minimum Depth
parameters.description: mindepth - Set a minmum depth for the sub-components the OP Find  should recursively search through.

parameters.name: Limit Max Depth
parameters.label: Limit Max Depth
parameters.description: limitmaxdepth - Turns on the Maximum Depth parameter to limit searching through sub-components. Turning this toggle off will search through all sub-networks.

parameters.name: Maximum Depth
parameters.label: Maximum Depth
parameters.description: maxdepth - Set the maximum depth for the sub-components the OP Find  should recursively search through.

parameters.name: Limit Max Operators
parameters.label: Limit Max Operators
parameters.description: limitmaxops - Limit the total number of operators iterated in the search.

parameters.name: Maximum Operators
parameters.label: Maximum Operators
parameters.description: maxops - Number of operators the search is limited to.

parameters.name: Object COMPs
parameters.label: Object COMPs
parameters.description: objects - Include Object COMPs, like Geo , in the search.

parameters.name: Panel COMPs
parameters.label: Panel COMPs
parameters.description: panels - Include Panel COMPs, like  , in the search.

parameters.name: Other COMPs
parameters.label: Other COMPs
parameters.description: other - Include other type COMPs, like Base , in the search.

parameters.name: TOPs
parameters.label: TOPs
parameters.description: tops - Include  family operators in the search.

parameters.name: CHOPs
parameters.label: CHOPs
parameters.description: chops - Include  family operators in the search.

parameters.name: SOPs
parameters.label: SOPs
parameters.description: sops - Include  family operators in the search.

parameters.name: MATs
parameters.label: MATs
parameters.description: mats - Include  family operators in the search.

parameters.name: DATs
parameters.label: DATs
parameters.description: dats - Include  family operators in the search.

parameters.name: Case Sensitive
parameters.label: Case Sensitive
parameters.description: casesensitive - Use case sensitivity in all pattern matching below.

parameters.name: Combine Filters
parameters.label: Combine Filters
parameters.description:
combinefilters -  - Combine 'All', 'Any' or 'Custom' of the filters below to get a match. 'Custom' allows for specifying a subselection of filters with 'or' and 'and' keywords.

 all - All filters must match for an operator to be included in the search result. (AND) any - Any of the filter conditions must be met for an operator to be included in the search result. (OR) custom -

parameters.name: All
parameters.label: All
parameters.description: all - All filters must match for an operator to be included in the search result. (AND) any - Any of the filter conditions must be met for an operator to be included in the search result. (OR) custom -

parameters.name: Custom Combine
parameters.label: Custom Combine
parameters.description: customcombine - Specify which filters to combine in the search.

parameters.name: Name
parameters.label: Name
parameters.description: namefilter - Use the operator's names like 'wave1', 'wave2', etc.

parameters.name: Type
parameters.label: Type
parameters.description: typefilter - Use names like waveCHOP and panelexecuteDAT. Look at the column Type to see the syntax.

parameters.name: Parent Shortcut
parameters.label: Parent Shortcut
parameters.description: parentshortcutfilter - Only match operators that include the here specified .

parameters.name: OP Shortcut
parameters.label: OP Shortcut
parameters.description: opshortcutfilter - Only match operators that include the here specified OP .

parameters.name: Path
parameters.label: Path
parameters.description: pathfilter - Specify a path that the operator should be located in.

parameters.name: Parent Path (relative)
parameters.label: Parent Path (relative)
parameters.description: parentfilter - Specify a relative parent path that operators should be located in. This is a filter option on the parentPath column of this  that can be enabled by toggling the Parent  parameter on this 's Columns page.

parameters.name: Exclude Path (relative)
parameters.label: Exclude Path (relative)
parameters.description: excludefilter - Specify a relative path that should be excluded from the search.

parameters.name: Wire Path
parameters.label: Wire Path
parameters.description: wirepathfilter -

parameters.name: Comment
parameters.label: Comment
parameters.description: commentfilter - Only match operators that include the here specified comment string.

parameters.name: Tags
parameters.label: Tags
parameters.description: tagsfilter - Only match operators that match the here specified tags. Multiple tags can be searched for as a space seperated list.

parameters.name: DAT Text
parameters.label: DAT Text
parameters.description: textfilter - Only include operators that - in the case of being from the  family - match specified string in their content.

parameters.name: Par Name
parameters.label: Par Name
parameters.description: parnamefilter - Only match operators with specified parameter name.  Parameters must match ALL of name, value and expression to be included.

parameters.name: Par Value
parameters.label: Par Value
parameters.description: parvaluefilter - Only include operators that match specified parameter value. Parameters must match ALL of name, value and expression to be included.

parameters.name: Par Expression
parameters.label: Par Expression
parameters.description: parexpressionfilter - Only include operators that match specified parameter expression string. Parameters must match ALL of name, value and expression to be included.

parameters.name: Par Non-Default Only
parameters.label: Par Non-Default Only
parameters.description: parnondefaultonly - Only match with parameters that are non-default values.

parameters.name: Use Legacy Columns
parameters.label: Use Legacy Columns
parameters.description: legacycols - Use only when expecting column headers to be named with legacy titles.

parameters.name: ID
parameters.label: ID
parameters.description: idcol - An integer that uniquely defines the node in this process. It's the same number for the duration of the process, but may be different when you run the process again.

parameters.name: Relative Path
parameters.label: Relative Path
parameters.description: relpathcol - Include the operator's, relative to the search root, path in the result table.

parameters.name: Parent Path
parameters.label: Parent Path
parameters.description: parentpath - Include the parent path.

parameters.name: Depth
parameters.label: Depth
parameters.description: depthcol - Include a column showing the relative depth to the root path of the found operator.

parameters.name: Cook Times
parameters.label: Cook Times
parameters.description: cooktimescol - Include cook-time of found operators.

parameters.name: General Properties
parameters.label: General Properties
parameters.description: genprop - Include the operator's name, id, isCOMP, node position, node size and dock id in the result table.

parameters.name: CPU Time
parameters.label: CPU Time
parameters.description: cputime - Include the operator's CPU cooktime in the result table.

parameters.name: GPU Time
parameters.label: GPU Time
parameters.description: gputime - Include the operator's  cooktime in the result table.

parameters.name: CPU Memory
parameters.label: CPU Memory
parameters.description: cpumem - Include the operator's CPU memory in the result table.

parameters.name: GPU Memory
parameters.label: GPU Memory
parameters.description: gpumem - Include the operator's  memory in the result table.

parameters.name: Children
parameters.label: Children
parameters.description: children - Include the children of the operator in the result table.

parameters.name: Callbacks DAT
parameters.label: Callbacks DAT
parameters.description: callbacks -  to a  containing callbacks for each event received. See opfindDAT_Class for usage.

parameters.name: Convert Bool to Int
parameters.label: Convert Bool to Int
parameters.description: convertbool - For boolean logic values, the value will be '1' or '0'. When this parameter is Off, they will be 'True" or 'False'.

parameters.name: Convert None to Empty
parameters.label: Convert None to Empty
parameters.description: convertnone - For 'None' values, the value will be converted to Empty.

parameters.name: Language

parameters.description:
language -  - Select how the  decides which script language to operate on.

 input - The  uses the inputs script language. node - The  uses it's own script language.

parameters.name: Input
parameters.label: Input
parameters.description: input - The  uses the inputs script language. node - The  uses it's own script language.

parameters.label: Edit/View Extension
parameters.description:
extension -  - Select the file extension this  should expose to external editors.

 dat - various common file extensions. language - pick extension from DATs script language. custom - Specify a custom extension.

parameters.name: dat
parameters.label: dat
parameters.description: dat - various common file extensions. language - pick extension from DATs script language. custom - Specify a custom extension.

parameters.name: Custom Extension
parameters.label: Custom Extension
parameters.description: customext - Specifiy the custom extension.

parameters.name: Word Wrap
parameters.label: Word Wrap
parameters.description:
wordwrap -  - Enable Word Wrap for Node Display.

 input - The  uses the inputs setting. on - Turn on Word Wrap. off - Turn off Word Wrap.
